name: semwitness
description: Proof-carrying compression, bounded intent evaluation, and isolated held-out promotion gates.

interface.shortDescription: Verify compression, intent candidates, and isolated promotion evidence.
interface.longDescription: SemWitness analyzes context, verifies deterministic compression, evaluates bounded intent compilers, and runs separate fail-closed evidence workbenches for compression-host promotion and shadow-only intent-cache qualification without transparent prompt interception or cache authorization.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this context for safe token savings with SemWitness.
Simulate compression and verify the resulting proof bundle.
Replay this fixture and compare its measured token cost.
Evaluate this held-out promotion evidence and emit a manifest only if every gate passes.
Evaluate this payload-free intent-cache evidence and emit a shadow qualification only if every gate passes.
Evaluate this intent normalizer offline in shadow mode.
Evaluate an OpenAI-compatible intent compiler with explicit network opt-in and a request budget.
